payload.text:
What habit would you like to build?

Type the name below — something short like "Meditate" or "Read 20 pages".

What time should I remind you?

Type it like 7:00 AM or 9:30 PM.

Ready to create your habit:

📝 Morning Meditation
🔁 daily
⏰ 07:00
🌍 UTC
Your habit is set up! You'll get gentle reminders at the scheduled time. Tap ✅ when you complete it, ⏭️ to skip, or 😴 to snooze.
